name: First Class Advanced Co. — Product Catalog

itemListElement.name: Iron Billets
itemListElement.description: High-quality steel billets, 100x100 to 200x200 mm, ASTM A615 / EN 10025 / JIS G3112.

itemListElement.name: Galvanized Steel Coils
itemListElement.description: Hot-dip galvanized steel coils, ASTM A653 / JIS G3302 / EN 10142, thickness 0.12-3.0mm.

itemListElement.name: Reinforcing Steel (Rebar)
itemListElement.description: Deformed reinforcing bars, ASTM A615 / BS 4449 / SASO 205 / EN 10080, 8-32mm diameters.

itemListElement.name: Copper & Aluminum Scrap
itemListElement.description: Recycling-grade copper and aluminum scrap, compressed bales, high purity.

itemListElement.name: Raw Plastic Materials
itemListElement.description: PE, PP, PVC, PS, ABS, PET raw plastic resins for industrial applications.

itemListElement.name: Raw Chemical Materials
itemListElement.description: Urea, sulfur, ammonia, phosphoric acid, caustic soda, and other industrial chemicals.
